'''dashata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbalax|mbalax]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbalax|mbalax]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dashata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæshætæth|dæshætæth]] || [[word:dæshætæj|dæshætæj]] || [[word:dæshætæsh|dæshætæsh]] || [[word:dæshætæ|dæshætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashashatath|dashashatath]] || [[word:dashashataj|dashashataj]] || [[word:dashashatash|dashashatash]] || [[word:dashashata|dashashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashatath|dashatath]] || [[word:dashataj|dashataj]] || [[word:dashatash|dashatash]] || [[word:dashata|dashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashaftath|dashaftath]] || [[word:dashaftaj|dashaftaj]] || [[word:dashaftash|dashaftash]] || [[word:dashaftaf|dashaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashatatha|dashatatha]] || [[word:dashataja|dashataja]] || [[word:dashatasha|dashatasha]] || [[word:dashataka|dashataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashatath|dashatath]] || [[word:dashataj|dashataj]] || [[word:dashatash|dashatash]] || [[word:dashata|dashata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashatathal|dashatathal]] || [[word:dashatajal|dashatajal]] || [[word:dashatashal|dashatashal]] || [[word:dashatakal|dashatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashatathatha|dashatathatha]] || [[word:dashatajaja|dashatajaja]] || [[word:dashatashasha|dashatashasha]] || [[word:dashataka|dashataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashatathan|dashatathan]] || [[word:dashatajan|dashatajan]] || [[word:dashatashan|dashatashan]] || [[word:dashatakan|dashatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashatathaoro|dashatathaoro]] || [[word:dashatajaoro|dashatajaoro]] || [[word:dashatashaoro|dashatashaoro]] || [[word:dashatakaoro|dashatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
